title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Haribhakti & Co

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Haribhakti & Co
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!
